channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cohere's European Expansion Signals Growth of AI Powers Outside US and China
item.description: Cohere's partnership with German-backed Aleph Alpha points to a growing bloc of AI companies positioning themselves between dominant US and Chinese players.

item.title: Anthropic Study Finds AI Raises Productivity and Job Displacement Concerns
item.description: An Anthropic study found that while AI use increases worker productivity, roughly one in five users expresses concern about potential job displacement.

item.title: NYT Strands Hints and Answers for Saturday, April 25
item.description: Extra hints and the full answer set for the April 25 NYT Strands puzzle are available to help players complete the grid and maintain their streak.

item.title: Meta CTO Says He Experiences Significant Stress Only About Five Times a Year
item.description: Meta CTO Andrew Bosworth describes his stress triggers as moments of high-stakes decision-making, and says physical exercise is his primary method of managing it.

item.title: Ford CEO Warns American Automakers Face a Compounding Set of Industry Pressures
item.description: Ford CEO Jim Farley said the company must make the right strategic bets to remain viable, describing the current operating environment as a defining challenge for US automakers.
